modDesc.author: JM / SebFS / Cédric C / Ronan LAR TP
modDesc.annotation: FS25 Convert by B.O.B (github.com/eusouanderson) | v1.0.1.0: Updated modDesc description format

description.en:
Renault K480 6x4 Meilleur Kipper - Dump Truck converted from FS22 to FS25.
Specifications: - Price: $130,000 - Power: 480 HP (500 HP motor) - Max Speed: 90 km/h - Mass: 7,250 kg - Transmission: 8 forward / 4 reverse gears - Drivetrain: 6x4 (tandem rear axles) - Fuel tank: 400L diesel / 60L DEF - Air tank: 4,000L - Load capacity: 25,000L bulk - Tires: Trelleborg
Features: - Configurable chassis and body color - Tipping: Back, Right, Left - Interactive controls: Ladder, side doors, anti-roll bar - Tension belts included - Hook lift trailer compatible - Onboard air brake system
Original FS22 mod by JM / SebFS / Cédric C / Ronan LAR TP Converted to FS25 by B.O.B (github.com/eusouanderson)
